name: letter with patient and multiple doctors
ocr_text:
===== EMBEDDED PDF TEXT =====
Dr Avery Referrer
Orthopaedic Specialist

Dear Dr Surgeon,

Re: Ms Alex Sample
DOB: 01/01/1970

I reviewed Alex today regarding worsening right knee pain. Please find attached my clinical note.

Yours sincerely,
Dr Avery Referrer
Date: 16/05/2026
